name: 🌯 Chicken Shawarma Recipe
original:
🥩 Ingredients (3–4 servings)
For chicken marinade:
500 g boneless chicken (thigh or breast)
3 tbsp yogurt
2 tbsp olive oil
1 tbsp lemon juice
3 cloves garlic (minced)
1 tsp salt
1 tsp black pepper
1 tsp paprika
1 tsp cumin powder
½ tsp turmeric
½ tsp chili powder
½ tsp coriander powder
For shawarma wrap:
Pita bread or tortilla wraps
Sliced onions
Sliced tomatoes
Lettuce or cabbage
Garlic sauce:
4 tbsp mayonnaise
2 tbsp yogurt
1 tsp garlic paste
1 tsp lemon juice
Salt to taste
scaled:
🥩 Ingredients (3–4 servings)
For chicken marinade:
1500 g boneless chicken (thigh or breast)
9 tbsp yogurt
6 tbsp olive oil
3 tbsp lemon juice
9 cloves garlic (minced)
3 tsp salt
3 tsp black pepper
3 tsp paprika
3 tsp cumin powder
1 1/2 tsp turmeric
1 1/2 tsp chili powder
1 1/2 tsp coriander powder
For shawarma wrap:
Pita bread or tortilla wraps
Sliced onions
Sliced tomatoes
Lettuce or cabbage
Garlic sauce:
12 tbsp mayonnaise
6 tbsp yogurt
3 tsp garlic paste
3 tsp lemon juice
Salt to taste
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: 🍗 Chicken Broast Recipe (3 Servings)
original:
🥩 Ingredients (3 servings)
For chicken:
6 chicken pieces (leg or thigh pieces work best)
1 cup yogurt
1 tbsp lemon juice
1 tsp garlic paste
1 tsp ginger paste
1 tsp salt
1 tsp red chili powder
½ tsp black pepper
½ tsp turmeric
1 tsp paprika (optional)
For coating:
1 cup all-purpose flour (maida)
½ cup corn flour
1 tsp baking powder
1 tsp salt
1 tsp chili flakes (optional)
For frying:
Oil (for deep frying)
scaled:
🥩 Ingredients (3 servings)
For chicken:
6 chicken pieces (leg or thigh pieces work best)
3 cup yogurt
3 tbsp lemon juice
3 tsp garlic paste
3 tsp ginger paste
3 tsp salt
3 tsp red chili powder
1 1/2 tsp black pepper
1 1/2 tsp turmeric
3 tsp paprika (optional)
For coating:
3 cup all-purpose flour (maida)
1 1/2 cup corn flour
3 tsp baking powder
3 tsp salt
3 tsp chili flakes (optional)
For frying:
Oil (for deep frying)
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: 🍔 Beef Burger Recipe
original:
🥩 Ingredients (2 burgers)

For patties:

250 g minced beef (ground beef)
1 small onion (finely chopped)
1–2 garlic cloves (minced)
1 tsp salt
½ tsp black pepper
1 tsp soy sauce (optional, adds flavor)
1 tbsp bread crumbs (helps bind)
1 egg (optional, for binding)

For assembling:

2 burger buns
Lettuce leaves
2 cheese slices
Tomato slices
Onion rings
Ketchup / mayo / burger sauce
scaled:
🥩 Ingredients (2 burgers)

For patties:

1000 g minced beef (ground beef)
1 small onion (finely chopped)
1–2 garlic cloves (minced)
4 tsp salt
2 tsp black pepper
4 tsp soy sauce (optional, adds flavor)
4 tbsp bread crumbs (helps bind)
4 egg (optional, for binding)

For assembling:

2 burger buns
Lettuce leaves
2 cheese slices
Tomato slices
Onion rings
Ketchup / mayo / burger sauce
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: 🍛 Chicken Biryani Recipe (Serves 4)
original:
🧂 Ingredients

For the Chicken Marinade

500 g chicken, cut into pieces
1 cup yogurt
1 tbsp ginger-garlic paste
1 tsp red chili powder
½ tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp garam masala
1 tsp salt
1 tbsp lemon juice

For the Rice

2 cups basmati rice
6 cups water
2 bay leaves
4 green cardamoms
2 cloves
1 cinnamon stick
1 tsp salt

For the Biryani

2 large onions, thinly sliced
2 tomatoes, chopped
3 tbsp cooking oil or ghee
Fresh coriander leaves, chopped
Fresh mint leaves, chopped
A pinch of saffron soaked in 2 tbsp warm milk (optional)
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients

For the Chicken Marinade

1250 g chicken, cut into pieces
2 1/2 cup yogurt
2 1/2 tbsp ginger-garlic paste
2 1/2 tsp red chili powder
1 1/4 tsp turmeric powder
2 1/2 tsp garam masala
2 1/2 tsp salt
2 1/2 tbsp lemon juice

For the Rice

5 cups basmati rice
15 cups water
2 bay leaves
4 green cardamoms
5 cloves
1 cinnamon stick
2 1/2 tsp salt

For the Biryani

2 large onions, thinly sliced
2 tomatoes, chopped
7 1/2 tbsp cooking oil or ghee
Fresh coriander leaves, chopped
Fresh mint leaves, chopped
A pinch of saffron soaked in 5 tbsp warm milk (optional)
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: 🍛 Chicken Biryani Recipe (Serves 4)
original:
🧂 Ingredients
1 cup (240 ml) heavy cream
½ cup (120 ml) whole milk
⅓ cup (65 g) sugar
¼ cup (25 g) cocoa powder
1 tsp vanilla extract
A pinch of salt
50 g dark chocolate (optional, for richer taste)

13/16 cup (162 1/2 g) sugar

A pinch of salt
125 g dark chocolate (optional, for richer taste)

name: 🍪 Chocolate Chip Cookies Recipe (Serves 5)
original:
🧂 Ingredients
125 g butter (softened)
100 g brown sugar
50 g white sugar
1 egg
1 tsp vanilla extract
180 g all-purpose flour
½ tsp baking soda
¼ tsp salt
120 g chocolate chips
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients
250 g butter (softened)
200 g brown sugar
100 g white sugar
2 egg
2 tsp vanilla extract
360 g all-purpose flour
1 tsp baking soda
1/2 tsp salt
240 g chocolate chips
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.

name: White Sauce Pasta
original:
🧂 Ingredients

For pasta

300 g pasta (penne or spaghetti)
Water (for boiling)
1 tsp salt

For white sauce (béchamel)

2 tbsp butter
2 tbsp all-purpose flour (maida)
2 cups milk (500 ml)
1 tsp salt (adjust to taste)
½ tsp black pepper
½ tsp chili flakes (optional)
½ tsp oregano

Vegetables (optional but recommended)

1 small onion, sliced
1 capsicum, chopped
½ cup sweet corn
½ cup mushrooms (optional)
scaled:
🧂 Ingredients

For pasta

600 g pasta (penne or spaghetti)
Water (for boiling)
2 tsp salt

For white sauce (béchamel)

4 tbsp butter
4 tbsp all-purpose flour (maida)
4 cups milk (1000 ml)
2 tsp salt (adjust to taste)
1 tsp black pepper
1 tsp chili flakes (optional)
1 tsp oregano

Vegetables (optional but recommended)

1 small onion, sliced
1 capsicum, chopped
1 cup sweet corn
1 cup mushrooms (optional)
tip: Use a larger pan or bowl when scaling up to keep cooking even and avoid spills.
